caption: A large blue and white aircraft, identified as Air Force One, is positioned on a tarmac against a backdrop of distant mountains and a town. The plane is viewed from a low, front-quarter angle, showcasing its engines and nose. In the initial sequence, the image is dim, then brightens as the plane remains stationary. A small rectangular yellow and black graphic briefly appears below the aircraft before disappearing. In the final sequence, a wide banner with a white background and bold black text reading "AIR FORCE ONE" appears at the bottom of the screen. A circular red and white logo containing the number "13" is visible in the upper right corner of every frame. The environment remains static throughout the clip, with no people visible.
